auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Intelliprint API key sent with the Authorization header. Create or manage API keys in the Intelliprint account API keys page: https://account.intelliprint.net/api_keys.

actions.name: get_background
actions.description: Retrieve a single Intelliprint reusable background by ID.

id.description: The Intelliprint background ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving an Intelliprint background.

created.description: The UNIX timestamp when the Intelliprint object was created.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint background response payload.

actions.name: get_mailing_list
actions.description: Retrieve a single Intelliprint mailing list by ID.

id.description: The Intelliprint mailing list ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving an Intelliprint mailing list.

created.description: The UNIX timestamp when the Intelliprint object was created.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint mailing list response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint mailing list response.

actions.name: get_mailing_list_recipient
actions.description: Retrieve one recipient from an Intelliprint mailing list.

mailingListId.description: The Intelliprint mailing list ID containing the recipient.

id.description: The Intelliprint mailing list recipient ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving an Intelliprint mailing list recipient.

created.description: The UNIX timestamp when the Intelliprint object was created.

recipient.description: An Intelliprint mailing list recipient object.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint mailing list recipient response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint mailing list recipient response.

actions.name: get_print
actions.description: Retrieve a single Intelliprint print job by ID.

id.description: The Intelliprint print job ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving an Intelliprint print job.

created.description: The UNIX timestamp when the Intelliprint object was created.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint print job response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint print job response.

actions.name: list_backgrounds
actions.description: List Intelliprint reusable backgrounds with official pagination, sorting, field selection, and team filtering.

limit.description: The maximum number of Intelliprint objects to return. The official API supports 1 through 1000.

skip.description: The number of Intelliprint objects to skip before returning results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction for the Intelliprint list request.

items.description: One Intelliprint response field name to include.

fields.description: The optional Intelliprint response fields to request.

sortField.description: The Intelliprint background field used to sort the list response.

team.description: The Intelliprint team ID used to filter reusable backgrounds.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intelliprint backgrounds.

items.description: An Intelliprint background object returned in the list.

data.description: The Intelliprint objects returned for this page.

totalAvailable.description: The total number of Intelliprint objects available across paginated requests.

hasMore.description: Whether another Intelliprint page is available after this response.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint list response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint background list response.

actions.name: list_mailing_list_recipients
actions.description: List recipients for one Intelliprint mailing list with official pagination, sorting, and field selection.

mailingListId.description: The Intelliprint mailing list ID whose recipients are listed.

limit.description: The maximum number of Intelliprint objects to return. The official API supports 1 through 1000.

skip.description: The number of Intelliprint objects to skip before returning results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction for the Intelliprint list request.

items.description: One Intelliprint response field name to include.

fields.description: The optional Intelliprint response fields to request.

sortField.description: The Intelliprint mailing list recipient field used to sort the list response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing recipients in an Intelliprint mailing list.

items.description: An Intelliprint mailing list recipient object returned in the list.

data.description: The Intelliprint objects returned for this page.

totalAvailable.description: The total number of Intelliprint objects available across paginated requests.

hasMore.description: Whether another Intelliprint page is available after this response.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint list response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint mailing list recipient response.

actions.name: list_mailing_lists
actions.description: List Intelliprint mailing lists with official pagination and sorting options.

limit.description: The maximum number of Intelliprint objects to return. The official API supports 1 through 1000.

skip.description: The number of Intelliprint objects to skip before returning results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction for the Intelliprint list request.

items.description: One Intelliprint response field name to include.

fields.description: The optional Intelliprint response fields to request.

sortField.description: The Intelliprint mailing list field used to sort the list response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intelliprint mailing lists.

items.description: An Intelliprint mailing list object returned in the list.

data.description: The Intelliprint objects returned for this page.

totalAvailable.description: The total number of Intelliprint objects available across paginated requests.

hasMore.description: Whether another Intelliprint page is available after this response.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint list response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint mailing list response.

actions.name: list_prints
actions.description: List Intelliprint print jobs with official pagination, sorting, and print-specific filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of Intelliprint objects to return. The official API supports 1 through 1000.

skip.description: The number of Intelliprint objects to skip before returning results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction for the Intelliprint list request.

items.description: One Intelliprint response field name to include.

fields.description: The optional Intelliprint response fields to request.

sortField.description: The Intelliprint print field used to sort the list response.

testmode.description: Whether to return only test mode print jobs.

confirmed.description: Whether to filter print jobs by confirmation state.

type.description: The Intelliprint print job type to filter by.

letterStatus.description: The letter status filter sent as letters.status.

returnedAcknowledged.description: Whether to filter returned letters by the acknowledged flag.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intelliprint print jobs.

items.description: An Intelliprint print job object returned in the list.

data.description: The Intelliprint objects returned for this page.

totalAvailable.description: The total number of Intelliprint objects available across paginated requests.

hasMore.description: Whether another Intelliprint page is available after this response.

raw.description: The raw Intelliprint list response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Intelliprint print job list response.
